title: Miracle-Gro Water Soluble Lawn Food, 1 kg
features: Dissolved nutrients lowers the risk of scorching
Easy to apply using the Miracle-Gro Feeder or mixing in a watering can
description: From the manufacturer Previous page Get a greener lawn in just 5 days Feeds the lawn and ensures thicker, greener grass in with stronger roots. Stronger roots Formulated with phosphate which promotes strong roots and potash which makes grass more resistant. Can also be applied via a Miracle-Gro Feeder There’s no mixing or measuring. Just add a sachet to a Miracle-Gro Feeder and away you go! Next page 1 Greener Lawn In 5 Days 2 Stronger Roots 3 Can Be Used In A Feeder Specially formulated to give you a beautiful green lawn in just 5 days Get a greener, thicker and healthier lawn in 5 days with strong roots, using our water soluble food. Apply once a month from early spring until the autumn to make your lawn more resistant to drought. Mix with water in a watering can or, for quick and easy application, use in a Miracle-Gro Feeder. Contains nitrogen (N) which makes sure your grass is green, phosphate (P) which makes sure you get strong roots, potash (K) which makes your grass more resistant to disease and drought, and iron (fe). Why should I use Miracle-Gro Soluble Lawn Food? Use every month throughout spring and summer for a deep, green lawn. Greens in 5 days and promotes stronger roots for a thicker, healthier lawn. Each 500g sachet feeds up to 100m². Measuring spoon provided in pack. When should I use Miracle-Gro Soluble Lawn Food? Use from March to September. Apply when the weather is fair, the soil is damp, and grass is dry and frost-free. Feed once a month. For newly-seeded autumn lawns (September to October), feed once when grass has taken seed, then once a month. How do I use Miracle-Gro Soluble Lawn Food? In a watering can, mix 1 large (15ml) level spoonful of Miracle-Gro EverGreen Water Soluble Lawn Food into an average sized 4.5L (1 gallon) watering can and spread evenly over 2.5m². Can also be used in a Miracle-Gro Feeder. How do I use Miracle-Gro Soluble Lawn Food with a Miracle-Gro Feeder? Just fill the jar with one sachet of Miracle-Gro Soluble Lawn Food, top up with water, attach to the hosepipe and away you go! There’s no mixing or measuring. In just 15 minutes you can feed your lawn with all the right nutrients. product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Attention: Read the instructions carefully before using the product. Use the product only on lawns. Avoid contact with skin, eyes and clothing. In case of contact with skin or eyes, rinse immediately with water. Do not ingest. If swallowed, consult a doctor immediately. Store the product in a cool, dry and well-ventilated area. Keep the product away from heat sources. Keep the product out of reach of children and pets.
